label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so there's this problem about a teacher and four students. The teacher picks four consecutive two-digit numbers, gives each student a different number from that set. The teacher tells them that there's a number divisible by 6 and another divisible by 7 in the set. Then she asks if any of them can figure out what the set S is. All four students say no. But after hearing that all four said no, they can figure it out. The question is asking for the sum of all possible values of the greatest element of S. First, let me parse the problem again. The set S has four consecutive two-digit numbers. So numbers like 10-13, 11-14,
